description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Tests - DeFiCh/metachain-ts-suite that runs on workflow dispatch and pull requests to the master branch. The workflow should have concurrent job management, cancelling in-progress jobs for non-master branches. It consists of two jobs: build and test. The build job runs on an ubuntu-latest environment in a defi/ain-builder:latest container, performing a series of setup and build steps, and uploading binaries as an artifact. The test job depends on the build job, checks out a separate repository, downloads the binaries, sets up Node.js 18, installs dependencies, compiles contracts, and runs tests.
